title: SQL: select interval ... + date ...
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_date DATE NOT NULL);
SELECT event_date + INTERVAL 1 DAY FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
SELECT INTERVAL 1 DAY + event_date FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
SELECT event_date FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Adding interval to date in SQL query
